Text.Main: I handle all exchanges with animals here. I only deal with the Thugz and CB'ers so go away!
I'm in charge of sellin' all the clear water around these parts. The water is not frozen right now, it is just resting.
Why are you bothering me? I know you hestia type don't need our water. Get!
